description_long: This is a large, cylindrical cup with a smooth, olive-green exterior and a slightly domed top. The lower portion of the cup features a band of stone-like texture, suggesting a reinforced or decorative base. A small, rectangular black opening is present on one side, above a set of wide, shallow steps that lead up to it, giving the impression of an entrance. The cup lacks a handle and has no visible lid, leaving the top surface exposed. The overall design is minimalistic, with no branding, logos, or decorative patterns. The cup appears to be constructed primarily from a hard, opaque material, possibly ceramic or metal, with a stone base for added stability.
description: A large, olive-green cylindrical cup with a stone-textured base and a small black opening above a set of steps. The cup is minimalistic, lacking a handle, lid, or decorative patterns.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black rectangular opening and the wide steps leading up to it, with the stone-textured base visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the smooth, uninterrupted olive-green surface and the stone-textured base, with the steps partially visible on the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous olive-green surface and stone-textured base, with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the smooth surface and stone-textured base, with the steps partially visible on the right.
